meta.title: Watch NASA send a probe to the sun!
meta.description:
Read all about this launch, what/where/why/when/how here! https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-parker-solar-probe/

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Enter the Project Mars Competition! -  www.ProjectMarsCompetition.org

Check out news articles and articles based on my videos on my website - http://everydayastronaut.com

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

SpaceX models by Oli Braun http://twitter.com/oli_braun and his store - https://www.buzzspacemodels.com/
